code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      match string.parse_int(p)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect_dedup(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut inter: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(inter, x)
        inter = list.push(inter, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  inter
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = match remaining.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut k = 1
    while k < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(k)
      when Some(v)
        if v < min_val
          min_val = v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut removed = false
    mut m = 0
    while m < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(m)
      when Some(v)
        if v == min_val and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      m = m + 1
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
  end
  sorted
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line_a = read_or_empty()
let line_b = read_or_empty()
let a = parse_ints(line_a)
let b = parse_ints(line_b)
let inter = intersect_dedup(a, b)
let sorted = sort_list(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut p = 0
  while p < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(p)
    when Some(v)
      if p == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    p = p + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
